message:
fix(triage,plan): exclude in_progress items from top_picks and highest_impact

Legacy Go bv excludes in_progress issues from triage top_picks and plan
highest_impact since they represent work already claimed. Rust bvr was
including them, causing ADV-100 (in_progress P0) to appear in top picks
instead of the Go-expected ADV-104/ADV-108.

This fixes both remaining adversarial conformance failures, bringing
conformance from 73/75 to 75/75 (100%).

The full recommendations list still includes in_progress items so
operators can see "continue work" suggestions — only the top_picks
quick-reference and plan highest_impact exclude them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
